summary: Phase 10 Live Re-Evaluation Engine testing completed. Backend API fully functional with all validation tests passing. Frontend LiveReevalPanel successfully integrated into LivePage with manual odds flow working correctly. Sport segregation verified via code review (isFootball gate). BSON serialization working without errors.

flaky_endpoints.impact: External testing affected, but localhost:8001 works perfectly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/live/reevaluate without manual_odds returns NO_LIVE_VALUE with Spanish message asking for cuota
Backend: POST /api/live/reevaluate with manual_odds=1.85 and manual_market='Under 2.5' returns LIVE_VALUE_WINDOW with edge=45.94%, confidence=100, risk=MEDIUM, manual_odds_used=true
Backend: Invalid odds ≤1.01 returns 400 with error message 'manual_odds must be > 1.01'
Backend: Negative odds returns 400
Backend: manual_odds without manual_market returns 400 with error 'manual_odds and manual_market must be provided TOGETHER'
Backend: Non-existent match_id returns 404
Backend: Basketball (non-football sport) returns 400 with error 'Live re-evaluation is currently football-only'
Backend: BSON serialization working (live_reevaluations persisted without 'documents must have only string keys' errors)
Frontend: LiveReevalPanel renders with data-testid='live-reeval-{match_id}' for live football matches
Frontend: Panel positioned outside navigation Link (verified in code - LivePage.jsx line 302-308)
Frontend: Re-eval button (data-testid='reeval-btn-{match_id}') triggers API and displays result
Frontend: Result panel (data-testid='reeval-result-{match_id}') displays with state badge, action, edge, confidence cells
Frontend: Manual odds toggle (data-testid='reeval-toggle-manual-{match_id}') opens form

Frontend: Manual form includes checkbox (data-testid='reeval-use-manual-{match_id}'), market select (data-testid='reeval-market-select-{match_id}'), odds input (data-testid='reeval-manual-odds-{match_id}')
Frontend: Manual odds badge (data-testid='reeval-manual-flag-{match_id}') displays 'Cuota tuya' when manual odds used
Frontend: Sport segregation - LiveReevalPanel only renders for football (verified via code: isFootball gate in LivePage.jsx line 305)
Frontend: All Spanish UI labels present ('Reevaluar ahora', 'Cuota tuya', 'Ingresa cuota decimal > 1.01')
Frontend: State badges display correctly (VENTANA DE VALOR, Riesgo: MEDIUM)
Frontend: Edge displays with correct formatting (+56.96%)
Frontend: Confidence displays as fraction (100/100)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - sport segregation verified via code review instead of live test due to timeout)

response.reason: Sin cuota disponible (ni pre-match ni manual). Ingresa la cuota de tu bookie para reevaluar.

no_manual_odds.note: Correctly asks for manual odds when pre-match odds unavailable

with_manual_odds.note: All required fields present, manual_odds_used=true as expected

missing_market_validation.detail: manual_odds and manual_market must be provided TOGETHER (or both omitted).

non_football_sport.detail: Live re-evaluation is currently football-only. Got sport=basketball.

findings: LiveReevalPanel renders per live football match
Panel has correct data-testid structure: live-reeval-{match_id}
Panel positioned outside Link component (lines 302-308 in LivePage.jsx)
Buttons and inputs do not trigger navigation

steps_verified: Click 'Reevaluar ahora' button → API call triggered
Result panel displays with state, action, edge, confidence
Click manual odds toggle → form opens
Check 'Usar mi cuota del bookie' checkbox
Click 'Reevaluar ahora' again → manual odds badge appears ('Cuota tuya')

sport_segregation.note: Panel only renders when sport === 'football'. Live test incomplete due to preview environment timeout, but code review confirms correct implementation.

bson_serialization.verification: Manual odds test passed without BSON errors, confirming serialization works correctly
